prompt: A harvester collects crops while a trailer follows to gather the load. The trailer must stay within 5 meters of the harvester. If distance exceeds 10 meters, both must stop and resynchronize within 15 seconds.
constraints: TrailerBot maintains distance ≤ 5 meters from Harvester
Harvester and TrailerBot must resynchronize within 15 seconds of stopping
